name: figma-to-elementor-system
description: Codex workflow system for converting Figma designs into Elementor design systems, pages, templates, containers, widgets, assets, responsive rules, and HTML reports.

interface.shortDescription: Convert Figma designs into professional Elementor systems.
interface.longDescription: A modular Codex workflow that analyzes Figma designs, builds a normalized design system, maps structures to Elementor, creates or updates Elementor drafts through MCP, optimizes assets, validates responsiveness, and produces HTML documentation.
defaultPrompt: Convert this Figma frame into an Elementor draft
Build an Elementor design system from this Figma file
Review a Figma to Elementor conversion plan
